items.title: Visa Elects Bill Ready to its Board of Directors
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO, September 29, 2025--Visa (NYSE: V) Visa announced today that Bill Ready has been elected to its board of directors, effective September 29, 2025.

items.title: BitMine Jumps 5% As Ethereum Treasury Surges Past 2.65 Million ETH
